content:
1. Generates monthly article report (title/author/date/wordcount/category per article) from DB, with optional category filter; exists as quick unscalable demo.

2. N+1 query cost on authors; date math off-by-one risk; mutates report in place; no validation of inputs or author lookup results.

3. Batch author fetch vs. pushing category filter into SQL; overall production readiness.

4. Invalid month/year, missing authors, empty categories list, timezone/datetime edge cases, DB errors, negative/None word counts.
